reason: This is a standard hadith (prophetic saying) sharing a peaceful religious message about good deeds. It contains no extremist content or ISIS-related themes.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
original_post: قال رسول اللهبينما رجل يمشي بطريق وجد غصن شوك على الطريق فأخذه فشكر الله له فغفر له - صحيح البخاري ﷺ #ﷺ
